heroSubheading: A friendly, competitive badminton club based in Lymm, Cheshire.
aboutText:
Welcome to Remnants Badminton Club! We are a friendly competitive Badminton England affiliated club based at Lymm Leisure Centre, Cheshire and we play across two or three courts with feather shuttles. Club nights are on Tuesdays 8-10 pm and home matches also played on Tuesday 8-10pm. Guests are welcome but please let us know in advance just so we can make sure there's space first!

We currently have several teams in the Crewe and District league - a Mens* team in Division 1 and a Mixed team in Hybrid Divison 1 as well as a mixed team in division one of the Stockport league. (*Mens teams can include female players in the Crewe League)

We're a friendly bunch and will have a laugh at club night along with a few socials each season, generally a mixture of meals out, games nights and presentation dinners.
venueAddress: Lymm Leisure Centre, Reddish Lane, Lymm, WA13 0AL
